scripts.ops:daily: npm.cmd run dashboard:audit:territory && npm.cmd run dashboard:audit:sku && npm.cmd run dashboard:validate:sku && npm.cmd run dashboard:snapshot:daily && npm.cmd run dashboard:export:urgent && npm.cmd run dashboard:history:build && npm.cmd run dashboard:history:summary && npm.cmd run dashboard:history:validate && node scripts/generate-ops-daily-report.js
scripts.ops:daily:collect: npm.cmd run dashboard:collect && npm.cmd run ops:daily && node scripts/generate-ops-daily-report.js --with-collect
scripts.ops:start-day: npm.cmd run ops:daily && npm.cmd run ops:health
scripts.ops:start-day:collect: npm.cmd run ops:daily:collect && npm.cmd run ops:health
scripts.ops:end-day: npm.cmd run ops:daily && npm.cmd run ops:health && node scripts/generate-ops-eod-summary.js
scripts.ops:end-day:collect: npm.cmd run ops:daily:collect && npm.cmd run ops:health && node scripts/generate-ops-eod-summary.js
scripts.ops:monitor: npm.cmd run ops:daily && npm.cmd run ops:health && node scripts/ops-alert-check.js
scripts.ops:monitor:collect: npm.cmd run ops:daily:collect && npm.cmd run ops:health && node scripts/ops-alert-check.js
scripts.ops:close-shift: npm.cmd run ops:end-day && node scripts/ops-alert-check.js && npm.cmd run ops:handoff && npm.cmd run ops:trend
scripts.discovery:cycle: npm.cmd run discovery:validate && npm.cmd run discovery:summary && npm.cmd run discovery:status && npm.cmd run discovery:plan
scripts.discovery:start-day: npm.cmd run discovery:day && npm.cmd run discovery:next && npm.cmd run discovery:status
scripts.discovery:end-day: npm.cmd run discovery:cycle && node scripts/discovery-end-day-report.js && npm.cmd run discovery:go-check
